title: 有時真係好葡萄澳門人

replies.msg:
oh門香港大家都係殖民地，大家都俾強國收番，大家都逐步蝗化。

但同香港唔同既係，當年既真澳門人，全部都可以有葡萄牙國籍，就算佢地仍然住係澳門，佢地d仔女都全部係葡萄牙人，成個歐盟想住邊就住邊想係邊到生活就係邊到生活。

所以點解澳門可以蝗化得咁犀利，因為佢地根本就唔care，隨時話走就走。

以前係英國讀書果陣，識勁多澳門人都係靠葡萄牙國籍用歐盟身份去英國讀書，讀完直接定居英國唔番去，真心屈機

Please find the following information for your reference:

APPLICATION / RENEWAL OF CITIZEN CARD


Submission and presentation of documents:

- Photocopy of Portuguese Identity Card / Citizen Card, and the original.
- Photocopy of Hong Kong Resident Identity Card, and the original.
- Address in Portuguese or English
- Photo not required


Remarks: Photocopies of Portuguese Identity Card / Citizen Card and HK Resident Identity Card should be taken separately on an A4 paper, with both sides of the documents printed on the same side of the page.



Note: You are required to provide digital copies of your Portuguese ID Card and HK ID card (by attachment file format) when requesting an appointment in Hong Kong. Please send all your documents to this email at one time.



APPLICATION / RENEWAL OF PASSPORT


Submission and presentation of documents:

- Photocopy of former passport, and the original, with validity of not more than 6 months. (six months prior to the expiry date)
- Photocopy of the valid Portuguese Citizen Card, and the original.

- Photocopy of Hong Kong Resident Identity Card, and the original.
- Address in Portuguese or English
- Photo not required


Applicants under the age of 18 should come to the Consulate with one of the parents:
- If parents are married, the applicant must be accompanied by one of the parents, and photocopies of both parents’ valid Identity Cards must be submitted with presentation of the originals. For the non-Portuguese resident, please submit and present photocopy of the Macao Resident Identity Card or passport and the original.
- If parents are not married or divorced, the applicant must be accompanied by the parent who has been granted the parental power. Photocopy of court judgment and Portuguese Citizen Card of the parent with the parental power must be submitted with presentation of the originals. For the non-Portuguese resident, please submit photocopy of the Macao Resident Identity Card or passport with presentation of the original.

Remarks: Photocopies of Portuguese Citizen Card and HK Resident Identity Card should be taken separately on an A4 paper, with both sides of the documents printed on the same side of the page. For the photocopy of the passport, the page that contains the bearer’s personal data is required.

利申：八十後，母係澳門人，我中學時已有葡國護照。
我無追哂全post ，但我個人經驗分享係send email 去葡萄牙的領事館，話工作關係不能過澳門，咁佢就會覆你叫你去香港搞證，基本要乜個email 會列哂出來，日子就要再聯絡澳門及香港個領事館，香港得一，三，五辦公，佢俾個日子你，就只有你去就個日子。
到今年，我個認別証＝葡萄牙身分證，已經續咗〔身分證係有期限要定期換〕，續完身分證跟手都續埋個護照了。
我個小朋友出世時已經即時申請了證別証，準備申請護照，而我太太都準備申請，但問過要考所謂移民試。

申請已經去到三代，現在香港市民有多國籍唔係問題，但遲下就難講

其實我最擔心都係領證年齡呢個問題
追返post大部分人都係成年前已搞哂認別證，有啲歲都未滿都搞埋，有人話試過帶17女去搞已經俾領事館話遲，而我90後都過左法定成年年齡，唔知仲有冇資格搞，但上面巴打又話呀媽有仔女一定自動有無論你大人定細路，當然你當年搞齊轉錄就直頭十拿九穩（但唔sure），查返資料有你咁就可以變左係續證形式
所以我都係等去問領事館算

無論你地係美國籍、加拿大籍、澳洲籍、紐西蘭籍、BC、葡籍，或者其他罕見國家既國籍

小弟係現居於港既加籍人士，剛剛寫左一封email比加拿大駐港總領使館就呢條條例表達關注

希望各位外國籍巴絲善用大家既西方國家護照，行使你享用領使服務既權利，一齊幫幫香港度過呢一關

===email範本===
以下呢封係小弟寫既template，如果有咩錯grammar既話請見諒，各位連登外國籍巴絲請隨便拎去用喇。

Dear (領事先生/女士),

I am a (國家名) citizen currently residing in Hong Kong, and am writing to you to express my deep concern regarding the proposed amendment of Extradition Law in Hong Kong. The amendment would allow Hong Kong Government to extradite fugitives to countries and regions that are not signatory of formal extradition treaty with Hong Kong, including China mainland. According to pro-Beijing newspaper Wenwei Po, citing source close to the central government, Chinese authorities could demand Hong Kong government to extradite foreign nationals who were considered a threat to national security to mainland China. However, it is clear from past experience that Chinese authorities had abused National Security Law to restrict freedom of speech, also to censor and persecute dissidents. The Extradition Law would effectively extend applicability of Chinese National Security Law to Hong Kong. (以下括號呢段僅適用於加拿大：As you may have already known, the political tension between P.R. China and Canada had risen due to the arrest of Huawei CFO Meng Wanzhou in Vancouver, and P.R. China’s government had arrested several Canadian citizens on dubious charges and some were even sentenced to death in retaliation for Meng’s arrest.) This raised the possibility that (國家名) citizens residing in Hong Kong would be exploited by Chinese government as political hostages and extradited to China on dubious and even fabricated charges. Since it is highly unlikely that any law courts in mainland China could provide a fair trial to defendants, due to heavy political influence on Chinese judicial system, the Extradition Law is a true threat to personal safety, assets and freedom of (國家名) citizens currently living in Hong Kong. Therefore, I wish you could reflect my concerns to the Ministry of Foreign Affairs of (國家名) and the (國家名) Government, and urge the (國家名) Government to join the rank of our American and European allies to take an official stance against the amendment of Extradition Law. Thank you very much for your attention.

Yours sincerely,

Mr. X (passport number: X)
